response.justification: Candidate demonstrates strong software leadership, architecture, and distributed systems experience with 15+ years of professional background. However, there are critical gaps in the minimum qualifications: only ~2 years of C++ programming (vs. required 8 years) and limited evidence of production cloud architecture experience. Recent work focuses on full-stack and AI infrastructure rather than cloud compute platforms. The leadership and mentoring capabilities are solid, but lack of C++ depth and cloud-specific expertise would likely create significant challenges in this role.
strengths: Proven technical leadership with multiple Staff roles and explicit mentoring track record (Refactoring Dojos, workshops, Selenium course, speaking engagements)
Large-scale distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second with async I/O and microservices architecture
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with demonstrated commitment to TDD, architecture, and creating testable systems across multiple projects and languages
concerns: Only ~2 years of C++ experience documented across career (National Instruments, Altom, thesis work) versus required 8 years; resume shows primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Java
Limited production cloud architecture experience—AWS CDK mentioned only at Optilyz; no evidence of deep cloud platform strategy, scaling decisions, or cloud-native infrastructure patterns
Recent role (re:cinq, 2025-present) focuses on full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure rather than cloud compute platform or infrastructure leadership
